title: Retrieve the accountUrl by accountId
excerpt:
Hello all, 
I’m trying to find a way to retrieve the accountUrl by accountId. Is it possible?

posts.author: mhung21 (Hung Do)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,
I’m trying to find a way to retrieve the accountUrl by accountId. Is it possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Just to confirm; are you looking to know your monday account’s ID or URL? If so, send our support team a message at support@monday.com and we can help out with this!

posts.author: mhung21 (Hung Do)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey CharlotteK,
Thanks so much for the feedback.
I’m looking to know the other monday account’s URL by their account ID, but I think it’s impossible.
